variables.notes: STD appears split. 'Liabilities to credit institutions' is a likely current borrowings line, while 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' captures current maturities of long-term debt. Manual review is needed to ensure these do not overlap in some years and to avoid double counting. Lease lines were excluded.
